source_note: Verified Petition of Commonwealth Edison Company (ComEd) for reconciliation of revenues billed under Rider CFRA (Carbon-Free Resource Adjustment) against actual costs associated with carbon-mitigation-credit expenditures, Illinois Commerce Commission Docket 24-0087, filed February 2, 2024. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: ICC e-Docket, document 346818 / file 605464 (landing: www.icc.illinois.gov/docket/P2024-0087/documents/346818).
